props.text: Explore a dynamic sandbox of interactive components. Unleash creativity, experiment with motion, and build captivating experiences. React Bits: where innovation comes to life.

copy.headline: Welcome to the React Bits Sandbox
copy.body: Experience groundbreaking UI components designed for dynamic interaction and stunning visuals. Hover over the text to unleash a world of physical motion.

componentWiring.name: FallingText
componentWiring.instantiation: <FallingText text={"Explore a dynamic sandbox of interactive components. Unleash creativity, experiment with motion, and build captivating experiences. React Bits: where innovation comes to life."} highlightWords={["Explore", "sandbox", "interactive", "Unleash", "creativity", "experiment", "motion", "captivating", "React Bits", "innovation", "life"]} highlightClass="highlighted-text" trigger="hover" backgroundColor="transparent" wireframes={false} gravity={0.5} fontSize="3.5rem" mouseConstraintStiffness={0.8} />

generatorInstruction:
This technical specification outlines the creation of a 'no-scroll' landing page, designed as a dynamic sandbox showcase for two interactive React components. The page features a deep black background contrasted with vibrant gold and orange accents, aiming for an engaging and exploratory mood.

To implement the `Iridescence` background effect, you must copy the entire folder located at C:/Users/Admin/Documents/Visual Studio Code/Reposetories/ReactBitRepository/ReactBitsComponents/Backgrounds/Iridescence into your project's `src/components/Backgrounds/Iridescence` directory. Additionally, install the `ogl` library via npm: `npm install ogl`. Integrate `Iridescence` as a fixed, full-viewport background layer (`position: fixed; z-index: -1;`), ensuring its `color` prop is set to `[1, 0.843, 0]` (which represents the hex color `#FFD700` in RGB format for WebGL compatibility), and `mouseReact` is `true` for interactivity.

For the interactive `FallingText` headline, copy its source from C:/Users/Admin/Documents/Visual Studio Code/Reposetories/ReactBitRepository/ReactBitsComponents/TextAnimations/FallingText to `src/components/TextAnimations/FallingText`. Install `matter-js` by running `npm install matter-js`. Embed `FallingText` within a flex container that spans the full viewport (`height: 100vh; width: 100vw; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; z-index: 1;`) to ensure it is centered and responsive. Set its `trigger` prop to `"hover"` for interactive physics, and define a `.highlighted-text` class in your global styles using `var(--color-accent)` to style highlighted words. Ensure `overflow: hidden` is applied to `html` and `body` elements to fulfill the 'no scroll' requirement, providing a seamless single-screen experience. Apply the specified design tokens for consistent theming and typography across the application.
